scripts.start: npm run build && npm run preview
scripts.convert:insurance: powershell -Command if (Test-Path dist\convertXLSX.cjs) { Remove-Item dist\convertXLSX.cjs -Force }; npx tsc utilities/convertXLSX.ts --outDir dist; if (Test-Path dist\convertXLSX.js) { Rename-Item -Path dist\convertXLSX.js -NewName convertXLSX.cjs -Force }; if (Test-Path dist\convertXLSX.cjs) { node dist\convertXLSX.cjs } else { Write-Host '❌ convertXLSX.cjs not found after build.' }
scripts.generate:tax: tsc scripts/test-tax.ts --outDir dist --module ESNext && node dist/scripts/test-tax.js
